utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Monica ? You gonna be very proud of me . I just got us dates with two unbelievably cute nurses .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Anyway , they want to take us out Saturday night ! What do you say ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_they want to take us out Saturday night !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm . Umm . Umm . I do not think so .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You ... you are the one who been telling me to get over Ross and move on .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am moving on , and you are moving on with me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Come on , give me one good reason why you do not wanna go .

utterances.text: Umm , why do not you give me something that would be a good reason and ... and then I will tell you if it is true .

utterances.text: Harder than it sounds . Is not it ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , you are coming with me , and I also told them that if we are still here when they get off that we will go down to the cafeteria and have some Jell ... O with them .
